creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Created attachment 212583
freebsd_chromium_errors.log

Hi, 
I have issues with chromium with 
combinations with web application discord. I tried use 
for video calls but in log from chromium much erros with use WebRTC
Call with web discord without video is generally good but sometimes with sound defect and delay. Solution is sometimes refresh tab with discord and again connect to talk. 
Call with web discord with video is this same problem and solution as without video. (DtlsTransport[audio|1|_W]: Received unexpected non-DTLS packet)
Call with web discord with shared desktop is good.
Here is errors from log:
